description: Two-stage funnel place discovery: Google Places seeds candidates, then locale-aware deep research (Tabelog/Naver/Le Fooding/Reddit/Wikipedia/OSM) ranks the 3-5 amazing things you should walk to, with a closed-signal kill-gate so dead places don't ship.

tools.name: places_reverse
tools.description: Reverse geocode lat/lng to a structured address. Required: lat, lng. Optional: format (default: json), addressdetails (default: 1), zoom (default: 18). Returns the GeocodeResult.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Always 'json' in this CLI.

tools.name: places_search
tools.description: Forward geocode an address, place name, or business to lat/lng candidates. Required: query. Optional: limit, format (default: json), addressdetails (default: 1) (plus 1 more). Returns array of GeocodeResult.

params.name: query
params.description: Free-text address, business name, or place (e.g. 'Park Hyatt Tokyo', '1600 Pennsylvania Ave').

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. Always 'json' in this CLI.

params.name: countrycodes
params.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes to constrain results (e.g. 'jp,kr,fr').
